message:
feat(robot): expand workflow status with pane validation and plan progress

Major enhancements to robot workflow status command:

Pane validation (new):
- Verify pane exists before querying workflows when --pane is specified
- Return E_PANE_NOT_FOUND with actionable hint if pane ID is invalid
- Prevents confusing "no workflows found" when pane simply doesn't exist

Step log optimization:
- Fetch only latest step log when not in verbose mode (uses new
  get_latest_step_log instead of loading all step logs)
- Load full step log history only when verbose > 0

Action plan progress tracking (new):
- Parse action plan JSON to extract total steps and current step name
- Include plan_step_name and total_steps in workflow status response
- Enables progress display like "Step 3/7: Validate configuration"

Response envelope improvements:
- current_step now populated from latest step log when available
- plan_progress object includes step_name from action plan
- Better separation of step logs (detailed) vs current_step (summary)

Performance: Non-verbose status queries now require only 2 DB queries
(workflow + latest step) instead of 3 (workflow + all steps + plan).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
